regional_cost_note: Builders in Tauranga typically charge $85–$120/hr. New build costs range $2,800–$4,000/m². Bay of Plenty is NZ's fastest-growing region; book builders well in advance.

businesses.name: Shaw Builders
businesses.known_for: Most decorated building company in Bay of Plenty; established 2002 by Dave and Carolynne Shaw with multiple regional supreme awards.

businesses.name: Calley Homes
businesses.known_for: Award-winning family-owned builder since 2005; Regional Supreme titles in 2018, 2021, and 2022; high-end residential specialist.

businesses.name: Landmark Homes Tauranga
businesses.known_for: On-time, on-budget delivery; led by Logan and Carly Stewart with transparent communication from design to handover.

businesses.name: Fairbairn Builders
businesses.known_for: Award-winning; operated by Jamie and Amie Fairbairn with 27+ years building high-quality new homes and renovations.

businesses.name: Precise Builders
businesses.known_for: Consistent 5-star reviews since 2008; Licensed Building Practitioner, NZ Certified Builders accredited.
